body: "Decision letter, Minded to Grant letter, Inspector’s Report and Supplementary Report for a recovered appeal for an outline planning permission (with all matters reserved except for means of access, parking and landscaping) for a new prison (up to 74,531.71 sqm GEA) (Class C2A) within a secure perimeter fence following demolition of existing buildings and structures and together with associated engineering works; outline planning permission for a replacement boiler house (with all matters reserved except for access); and full planning permission for a replacement bowling green and club house (Class F2(c)).\n"
